g.text: Read CR spec, status OCID, and delete intent
Get the OCI resource by known identifier
Resolve an existing OCI resource by display name
Persist the resolved or created OCID back into status
- Managed and name-resolved reconciles currently do not
enter UpdatePostgresDbSystem, so mutable updates are
Submit OCI delete for Postgres DB System
Confirm deletion with GetDbSystem until the resource is not found.
Delete the owned Secret after OCI delete confirmation.
Remove the finalizer after OCI deletion is confirmed
Stay blocked until Secret cleanup succeeds or is absent
Request requeue and keep the finalizer
Return an unsuccessful terminal reconcile result
Compare live OCI state with the supported drift surface
Reject the change before any OCI mutation
Validate immutable fields before any mutable update.
Move the PostgreSQL DB system compartment before supported updates when compartment drift exists.
Publish the primary endpoint and port through the connection Secret after a usable active reconcile.
Apply only the supported in-place update surface
Return success for the usable active state
Block successful completion until Secret sync succeeds
